cases.prompt: 내 PDF 문서들로 답하는 챗봇 RAG 만들어줘

assertions.text: Selects an embedding model and vector store (pgvector/Pinecone/Chroma/Qdrant tradeoff).
Enforces grounded citations and an eval (faithfulness/relevance/recall).

cases.prompt: Knowledge-base QA with vector search for my product

assertions.text: Designs retrieval with hybrid search + rerank.
